//: SIMULATED / PORTFOLIO -- fictional system, not a real assessment. CUI handling is hypothetical. No real DoD contract, no C3PAO assessment, no CMMC certification.

metadata.title: SIMULATED / PORTFOLIO -- Plan of Action and Milestones (POA&M): Aegis Defense Logistics Platform (NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 / CMMC Level 2)

parties.name: Ironwood Defense Systems LLC (FICTIONAL)
parties.remarks: Fictional defense subcontractor invented for this portfolio exercise.

parties.name: Ozirus B. Morency
parties.remarks: Portfolio author. SIMULATED artifact. No active clearance, no CMMC/CISSP/CISA certification, no production ISSO authority.

import-ssp.remarks: References the SIMULATED System Security Plan for the Aegis Defense Logistics Platform.

observations.title: Legacy admin console permits single-factor login and shared elevated role
observations.description: SIMULATED observation. The legacy administrative console allows password-only break-glass login and uses a shared elevated role, conflicting with least privilege (3.1.5) and MFA (3.5.3).

observations.title: Audit logs not centralized for database and batch worker tiers
observations.description: SIMULATED observation. The database and batch worker tiers do not forward audit records to the centralized logging service, creating gaps in audit coverage (3.3.1).

observations.title: Cryptographic modules not yet FIPS-validated
observations.description: SIMULATED observation. Industry-standard TLS is in use, but not all cryptographic modules protecting simulated CUI are FIPS 140-validated (3.13.11).

observations.title: No formal recurring security awareness training cadence
observations.description: SIMULATED observation. Security awareness training is delivered ad hoc with no recurring annual cadence or completion tracking (3.2.1).

observations.title: Vulnerability scanning runs quarterly instead of monthly
observations.description: SIMULATED observation. Vulnerability scanning is performed quarterly, below the targeted monthly cadence, reducing risk-assessment freshness (3.11.1).

risks.title: Unauthorized administrative access via legacy console
risks.description: SIMULATED risk. Single-factor, shared-role admin access could allow unauthorized privilege use.

risks.title: Incomplete audit trail impedes investigation
risks.description: SIMULATED risk. Missing centralized logs could prevent after-the-fact investigation of incidents.

risks.title: Non-FIPS crypto weakens CUI confidentiality assurance
risks.description: SIMULATED risk. Use of non-validated cryptographic modules may not meet CMMC L2 expectations for protecting CUI.

risks.title: Untrained workforce increases human-factor risk
risks.description: SIMULATED risk. Lack of recurring awareness training raises susceptibility to phishing and policy violations.

risks.title: Stale vulnerability posture
risks.description: SIMULATED risk. Quarterly scanning may leave exploitable vulnerabilities undetected for extended periods.

poam-items.title: POAM-0001: Enforce MFA and individual least-privilege accounts on legacy admin console
poam-items.description: SIMULATED. Remediate single-factor break-glass login and shared elevated role on the legacy administrative console by enforcing MFA and migrating to individually scoped administrator accounts. Addresses 3.1.5 and 3.5.3.
poam-items.remarks: Closure evidence (simulated): IdP policy export showing MFA required for all admin sessions; access-review report confirming removal of the shared role.

milestones.description: Onboard legacy console to the Aegis Identity Provider and require MFA for all admin logins.
Decommission shared elevated role and provision individual least-privilege admin accounts.

poam-items.title: POAM-0002: Centralize audit logging across all tiers
poam-items.description: SIMULATED. Forward audit records from the database and batch worker tiers to the centralized logging service to close audit-coverage gaps. Addresses 3.3.1.
poam-items.remarks: Closure evidence (simulated): logging dashboard showing ingestion from all in-boundary components; retention policy configuration.

milestones.description: Configure database audit log shipping to the centralized logging service.
Configure batch worker tier log forwarding and validate end-to-end coverage.

poam-items.title: POAM-0003: Roll out FIPS 140-validated cryptographic modules
poam-items.description: SIMULATED. Migrate cryptographic operations protecting simulated CUI to FIPS 140-validated modules. Addresses 3.13.11.
poam-items.remarks: Closure evidence (simulated): module CMVP certificate references; configuration showing FIPS mode enabled at gateway and data-at-rest layers.

milestones.description: Inventory all cryptographic modules and identify non-validated components.
Enable FIPS mode and replace non-validated modules in production-equivalent environment.

poam-items.title: POAM-0004: Establish recurring annual security awareness training
poam-items.description: SIMULATED. Implement a formal recurring annual security awareness training program with completion tracking for managers, administrators, and users. Addresses 3.2.1.
poam-items.remarks: Closure evidence (simulated): LMS completion report; training policy document with annual cadence.

milestones.description: Select training content and define annual cadence and role-based requirements.
Deliver first cycle and achieve 100 percent completion tracking.

poam-items.title: POAM-0005: Increase vulnerability scan frequency to monthly
poam-items.description: SIMULATED. Increase authenticated vulnerability scanning from quarterly to monthly and integrate findings into the risk-assessment process. Addresses 3.11.1.
poam-items.remarks: Closure evidence (simulated): scan scheduler configuration showing monthly cadence; three consecutive monthly scan reports.

milestones.description: Reconfigure the Aegis Vulnerability Scanning Service for monthly authenticated scans.
Validate three consecutive monthly cycles and integrate into risk register.
